summary.intent: Fix the diff viewer in the Gossamer project so checkpoints without a `CheckpointIdGitOidJoin` mapping show actual diffs instead of a plain filename list.
summary.outcome: The fix was partially designed (two-pronged: replace linear branch scan in gitUtils.ts with `git log --all --grep`, plus a server-side fallback using full.jsonl Write/Edit events) but implementation was interrupted before completion. Only a CSS file was modified.

repo: CheckpointIdGitOidJoin maps checkpoint IDs to git OIDs; when this mapping is absent, the diff viewer degrades to a plain filesTouched list.

findCommitForCheckpoint in gitUtils.ts scans commits linearly across hardcoded branches (branch, main, master) up to 10,000 commits — it misses commits on other branches, remote refs, or deleted branches.
full.jsonl contains Write/Edit tool call events that can be used to reconstruct diffs as a fallback when no git OID mapping exists.
The diff viewer and checkpoint mapping logic spans at least gitUtils.ts, indexer.ts, and server.ts.

code.finding: findCommitForCheckpoint does a linear branch scan limited to 3 hardcoded branches and 10,000 commits; should be replaced with `git log --all --grep="Entire-Checkpoint: <id>"`
Diff serving endpoint needs a fallback branch: when no git OID exists for a checkpoint, reconstruct diff from full.jsonl Write/Edit tool_use events
indexFullJsonl processes full.jsonl events and is relevant to understanding the fallback diff reconstruction approach

workflow: Using `git log --all --grep` is more robust than branch-by-branch linear scanning for finding commits by message content across an entire repo.

friction: User interrupted the session before the gitUtils.ts edit could be completed, leaving the fix unimplemented.
The only file actually modified (app/src/renderer/src/diff2html-theme.css) appears unrelated to the stated task — likely an accidental change or pre-existing modification.
open_items: Replace findCommitForCheckpoint linear branch scan in gitUtils.ts with `git log --all --grep="Entire-Checkpoint: <id>"` to cover all refs.
Add server-side fallback in server.ts to reconstruct diffs from full.jsonl Write/Edit tool calls for checkpoints with no git OID mapping.
Investigate and reconcile the unrelated modification to app/src/renderer/src/diff2html-theme.css.
